allow: Bash(# Find apksigner in Android SDK find ~/Library/Android/sdk/build-tools -name ""apksigner"")

Bash(python3 -c "
import qrcode
img = qrcode.make\(''https://mail.icd360s.de/updates/ICD360S_MailClient_v2.15.6.apk''\)
img.save\(''/Users/ionut-claudiuduinea/Documents/mail-client/ICD360S.MailClient.Flutter/build/app/outputs/flutter-apk/ICD360S_MailClient_QR.png''\)
print\(''QR code saved''\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(json.loads\(l\).get\(''''message'''',{}\).get\(''''content'''',''''''''\)[:200] if isinstance\(json.loads\(l\).get\(''''message'''',{}\).get\(''''content'''',''''''''\), str\) else str\(json.loads\(l\).get\(''''message'''',{}\).get\(''''content'''',''''''''\)\)[:200]\) for l in sys.stdin]")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "ls /etc/rspamd/local.d/mime_types* /etc/rspamd/local.d/multimap* 2>/dev/null; echo ''---''; cat /etc/rspamd/local.d/mime_types.conf 2>/dev/null || echo ''No mime_types.conf''; echo ''---''; cat /etc/rspamd/local.d/multimap.conf 2>/dev/null || echo ''No multimap.conf''")
Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "postconf header_checks mime_header_checks; echo ''---''; cat /etc/postfix/mime_header_checks 2>/dev/null || echo ''No mime_header_checks''")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "dig +short TXT _smtp._tls.icd360s.de; echo ''---''; echo ''=== Mail queue ===''; postqueue -p | tail -10; echo ''---''; echo ''=== Bayern delivery check ===''; grep ''bayern'' /var/log/maillog 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || journalctl -u postfix --since ''6 hours ago'' --no-pager | grep -i ''bayern'' | tail -5")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "cat /etc/resolv.conf; echo ''---''; dig +short TLSA _25._tcp.mail.icd360s.de @127.0.0.1 2>/dev/null; echo ''---''; systemctl list-units | grep -iE ''unbound|bind|dnsmasq|systemd-resolved|named'' 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "journalctl -u postfix --since ''1 hour ago'' --no-pager | grep -i ''bayern'' | tail -10; echo ''---''; echo ''Current time:''; date")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== CERT EXPIRY ===''; openssl x509 -in /etc/letsencrypt/live/mail.icd360s.de/cert.pem -noout -dates 2>/dev/null; echo ''--- RSA cert ---''; openssl x509 -in /etc/letsencrypt/live/mail.icd360s.de-rsa/cert.pem -noout -dates 2>/dev/null; echo; echo ''=== RECENT REJECTS \(not scanners\) ===''; journalctl -u postfix --since ''6 hours ago'' --no-pager | grep ''reject'' | grep -v ''haproxy\\|scanner\\|CONNECT'' | tail -15; echo; echo ''=== DMARC REPORT STATUS ===''; journalctl -u postfix --since ''6 hours ago'' --no-pager | grep -i ''dmarc\\|dmarcreport'' | tail -10")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== UNBOUND FORWARDING CONFIG ==='' && grep -A5 ''forward-zone'' /etc/unbound/unbound.conf 2>/dev/null; echo; grep -rn ''forward'' /etc/unbound/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null; echo; echo ''=== UNBOUND LOCAL CONFIG FILES ==='' && ls -la /etc/unbound/conf.d/ 2>/dev/null; echo; echo ''=== RSPAMD LAST RESTART ==='' && systemctl show rspamd --property=ActiveEnterTimestamp; echo; echo ''=== RSPAMD EFFECTIVE RBL STATUS ==='' && rspamadm configdump rbl 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''""enabled|""name'' | head -40")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== NEXT UID ==='' && awk -F: ''$3>=5000{print $1,$3}'' /etc/passwd | sort -t'' '' -k2 -n | tail -5; echo; echo ''=== POSTFIX ALIASES FOR INFO ==='' && grep -i ''info'' /etc/aliases 2>/dev/null; postconf virtual_alias_maps 2>/dev/null; grep -i ''info'' /etc/postfix/virtual 2>/dev/null || echo ''no virtual file''")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== WHOIS FULL ==='' && whois 91.92.243.144 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo; echo ''=== BAYKNDENIM.COM WHOIS ==='' && whois baykndenim.com 2>/dev/null | grep -iE ''registrant|name|country|org|email|created|registrar'' | head -10; echo; echo ''=== ASN ==='' && whois -h whois.cymru.com "" -v 91.92.243.144"" 2>/dev/null")
Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "id jasminaug 2>/dev/null; echo ''---''; awk -F: ''$3 >= 5000 {print $1, $3}'' /etc/passwd | sort -t'' '' -k2 -n | tail -5")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== SECURE LOG \(SSH/auth ultimele 24h\) ==='' && grep ''Mar 19\\|Mar 20'' /var/log/secure 2>/dev/null | tail -50; echo ''''; echo ''=== NGINX ACCESS \(ultimele 24h\) ==='' && grep ''Mar/2026'' /var/log/nginx/access.log 2>/dev/null | grep ''19/Mar\\|20/Mar'' | tail -50; echo ''''; echo ''=== NGINX ERRORS ==='' && grep ''2026/03/19\\|2026/03/20'' /var/log/nginx/error.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== RSPAMD LOG \(ultimele 24h\) ==='' && grep ''Mar 19\\|Mar 20'' /var/log/rspamd/rspamd.log 2>/dev/null | tail -80; echo ''''; echo ''=== FAIL2BAN LOG \(ultimele 24h\) ==='' && grep ''2026-03-19\\|2026-03-20'' /var/log/fail2ban.log 2>/dev/null | tail -60; echo ''''; echo ''=== DOVECOT \(ultimele 24h\) ==='' && journalctl -u dovecot --since ''24 hours ago'' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -40")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== FAIL2BAN BANS ultimele 24h ==='' && grep ''2026-03-19\\|2026-03-20'' /var/log/fail2ban.log | grep -E ''Ban|Unban'' | tail -60; echo ''''; echo ''=== HAProxy REJECTS \(fara cert\) ultimele 24h ==='' && grep ''Mar 19\\|Mar 20'' /var/log/haproxy.log | grep -v ''80.187.100.220'' | tail -30; echo ''''; echo ''=== SERVICII STATUS ==='' && systemctl is-active postfix dovecot haproxy nginx rspamd fail2ban firewalld sshd 2>/dev/null | paste -d'' '' - - - - - - - -; echo ''''; echo ''=== UPTIME ==='' && uptime")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== RSPAMD DETALII coeo-inkasso ==='' && grep -i ''coeo'' /var/log/rspamd/rspamd.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20; echo ''''; echo ''=== MAILLOG coeo ==='' && grep -i ''coeo'' /var/log/maillog 2>/dev/null | tail -10; echo ''''; echo ''=== WHITELIST EXISTENTA ==='' && ls /etc/rspamd/local.d/ | grep -i white; cat /etc/rspamd/local.d/whitelist_domains.map 2>/dev/null; echo ''''; echo ''=== MULTIMAP CONFIG ==='' && cat /etc/rspamd/local.d/multimap.conf 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== Verificare whitelist ==='' && cat /etc/rspamd/local.d/whitelist_domains.map && echo '''' && echo ''=== Verificare multimap ==='' && cat /etc/rspamd/local.d/multimap.conf && echo '''' && echo ''=== Rspamd status ==='' && systemctl is-active rspamd")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== TOATE EMAILURILE BLOCATE DE RSPAMD ==='' && grep ''milter-reject\\|reject:'' /var/log/maillog | grep -v ''Helo command rejected\\|need fully-qualified'' | tail -30; echo ''''; echo ''=== RSPAMD REJECT LOG \(detalii\) ==='' && grep ''reject'' /var/log/rspamd/rspamd.log 2>/dev/null | tail -30")

Bash(ssh -i "$SSH_KEY" -p 36000 root@mail.icd360s.de "echo ''=== MESSAGE SIZE LIMIT ==='' && postconf message_size_limit && echo '''' && echo ''=== MAILBOX SIZE LIMIT ==='' && postconf mailbox_size_limit && echo '''' && echo ''=== DOVECOT QUOTA ==='' && doveconf -n | grep quota && echo '''' && echo ''=== ERORI TRIMITERE RECENTE ==='' && grep -i ''reject\\|error\\|bounce\\|size\\|too large\\|exceeded'' /var/log/maillog | grep -v ''Helo command\\|need fully-qualified\\|Relay access\\|spamhaus\\|spamcop'' | tail -20; echo '''' && echo ''=== HAPROXY MAXCONN/TIMEOUT ==='' && grep -E ''maxconn|timeout|tune.bufsize'' /etc/haproxy/haproxy.cfg | head -10")
